extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João won the 25.4km time trial to take race lead, but CATANIO (not in roster) set best intermediate split before fading on final section.
tactical_patterns: ALMEIDA João closed 8.6-second deficit from intermediate split to finish, revealing superior pacing strategy on second half of course.
Non-time trial specialists like HERSHEY Mark lost disproportionately more time in second half, suggesting technical course favored diesel engines over pure power.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: Erased intermediate time deficit on technical second half, demonstrating superior pacing discipline over pure chronomen
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: Fourth overall with top-5 TT finish reveals GC threat beyond mountain support role
